---
title: "The Rev. Evelyn Dawsonne Heathcote"
---

## The Rev. Evelyn Dawsonne Heathcote

**Dates:** (11 Nov 1844-1 May 1908)

### Description

son of Sir William Heathcote

### Biography

He married (19 December 1876) Grace Hussey.  He was the fifth son (second by the second marriage) of Sir William Heathcote [PB Heathcote]

### Letters

- Letter from Aug 7 th [1876]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
